content: helpp i dont understand the end of arc 1
did gramona take a part of our mind and went back in time??
||not back in time but to a different universe entirely||
i dont get it
so
gramona use her magik power
to teleport our mind? to another universe?
idk if its mind or body since keeper body was gone after sealing the door i think
but the dialogues also said she was bringing the mind back to "the start of it all"
so i thought maybe its like a time loop or something
keeper defeat eyes -> body gone -> gramona takes mind back to the past -> here comes keeper when they first wake up and have memory lost
-> the whole game
how much of arc 2 ch1 have you done
probably none of it
i didnt do any yet
but im fine with spoiling
im just too tired to do arc 2 now
arc 1 drained my ass lol 😭
help me explain 😭 i cant sleep with my mind occupied like this
nah
https://tenor.com/view/angry-angry-cat-mad-cat-mad-death-stare-gif-2007099240114134459
block report
No, Completely different universe

||at the end of arc 1, before keeper’s mind completely fell dormant, ramona allowed gramona to possess her body. gramona then used her funny genesis powers to take a fragment of our mind (and only our mind) to the universe arc 2 takes place in. in arc 2, our relationships basically start from scratch. also we were transported to arc 2 without a body, but gdoll managed to capture the fragment of our mind that gramona saved and gave it a brain (in a vat) to inhabit||

||keeper can still talk as a floating brain, idk if he’s projecting his voice or if its more like telepathy, but eventually he convinces arc 2 winkle to awaken arc 2 daffodil, who offers her services and provides keeper an actual body in exchange for gdoll’s head (tbh it’s unclear if we actually did fulfil our end of the bargain||
||its also why in the raid stories, arc 2 daff asks if keeper had any issues with his new body||
the very same daff?

||Iirc it's like...part of the Keeper is dormant (their original "body") but the way Gramona used that strand of consciousness the Keeper gave her allowed that same consciousness to be freed

one strand alone allows for their whole consciousness to "connect", because one strand is enough for the entire consciousness to "expand" (in other words, GRamona saved the Keeper's "core/source" consciousness) and roam free while a part of them, specifically the "body" that contains the most power, is still considered to be "sleeping", which makes sense given the nature of the Keeper||

||so basically: same Keeper as arc 1, but a part of their "body" is still sealed (so less power/energy compared to the end of arc 1), while their mind/consciousness is freed and walks the world once more (and was caught by Gdoll when GRamona freed them)||
||although...it seems even that dormant "body" won't be a long-term solution||
Yes, she's visibly the same one

||The Keeper's original body is still stuck behind the gate though, and, despite "separating", it's more akin to an "extension" in nature 

they're still connected as one consciousness, which has continuity 

So I'm wondering if there will consequences and issues concerning the Keeper's goal of returning in the Arc 1 World due to this||
